goal: A local, loopback-only web 'Mission Control' for agentic-os that makes the four mechanics (skills installed, tokens available/used, running goals + lifecycle, % to goal) glanceable, honest, accessible, and beautiful — verified live against a frozen design direction.
note: SEED rubric from /prd (whole-product). /goal-opus scopes a per-PHASE subset each run (see PRD §7 roadmap). U0 design-direction MUST be frozen in the target BEFORE any UI slice — vision-verify criteria (C12) need anchors. Confidence tiers + evidence in PRD.md §4.

criteria.statement: The server binds loopback-only (127.0.0.1) and REJECTS any request whose Host header is not a localhost allowlist entry (DNS-rebinding defense; loopback bind alone is insufficient).
criteria.verify: Start the server; assert it is not listening on 0.0.0.0/any non-loopback interface (netstat/ss). curl -H 'Host: evil.example' http://127.0.0.1:<port>/ returns 4xx (rejected); curl -H 'Host: 127.0.0.1:<port>' returns 200. Maps U9/U10/B4.

criteria.statement: A torn/partial run-status.json read is NEVER rendered as 'no run', a crash, or a blank dashboard — the reader retries and falls back to last-known-good.
criteria.verify: Fixture: write a truncated/partial run-status.json (mid-write). Point the reader at it; assert it returns the last-known-good snapshot and the dashboard keeps rendering (no exception, no 'no run'/blank). Repeat with a valid file after → updates. Maps U1/B2.

criteria.statement: A crashed run (in_flight present on disk with no session_end) is shown as a DISTINCT 'crashed' state — not 'running', not 'no run'.
criteria.verify: Fixture: run-status.json with in_flight={goal,iter} and a run-log with no session_end. Assert the UI state renders 'crashed/interrupted' (a third state), distinct from live-running and from empty. Maps U6/U24.

criteria.statement: '% to goal' is rubric-derived (criteria_passing/criteria_total), NON-MONOTONIC (can decrease), uses no fake-fill animation, and shows 100% only on a verifier-confirmed land-gate pass.
criteria.verify: Fixture run-log where criteria_passing goes 2/5 -> 3/5 -> 2/5. Assert the progress ring DROPS on the regression (no high-water lock). Assert Default-FAIL 0/M renders an honest 'not started' zero (no animated fill). Assert 100% appears only when a land_gate 'land' event is present. Maps U14/U15/B6.

criteria.statement: Stale data is never shown as live: the UI computes liveness from mtime/heartbeat staleness and displays 'last updated Ns ago' + a stale indicator past a threshold.
criteria.verify: Stop updating the fixture files; assert the UI flips to a visible 'stale / possibly dead' indicator and shows elapsed time, rather than continuing to present the frozen frame as live. Maps U5/B1.

criteria.statement: Every run/goal/criterion STATE is conveyed by icon + text label in addition to color (no color-only state).
criteria.verify: Automated DOM assertion: for each status token in each state (running/success/aborted/stopped/declined/flagged/held/no-progress), assert a non-color signifier (icon + text) is present. Manual: grayscale screenshot remains legible. Maps U35/B7 (WCAG 2.2 SC 1.4.1).

criteria.statement: Live-updating metrics live in ARIA live regions declared empty at load (polite for routine, assertive only for crash/block/budget) and per-iteration rewrites do not steal focus.
criteria.verify: Assert live regions exist in the DOM at load; a routine iteration update uses aria-live=polite; a budget/crash/block event uses assertive/role=alert; focus is unchanged across an iteration rewrite. Maps U36 (WCAG 2.2 SC 4.1.3).

criteria.statement: With prefers-reduced-motion: reduce, non-essential motion is replaced by a static color+icon fallback (not merely deleted), and an in-app toggle exists.
criteria.verify: Set the media feature; assert animated meters/counters/flow fall back to static state indicators that still convey the state change; assert an in-app reduced-motion toggle. Maps U37/B8 (WCAG 2.2 SC 2.3.3 / C39).

criteria.statement: No secret present in STATE.md or run-log is re-displayed or exported by the UI (display-time re-redaction; the CLI scrub is gameable and does not cover STATE.md/run-status.json).
criteria.verify: Fixture: inject a fake secret (e.g. 'api_key=SEKRET123') into STATE.md and a run-log line. Assert the string does NOT appear in the rendered DOM or any export/download. Maps U13/B5.

criteria.statement: The run-log panel is virtualized (renders only visible rows) and stays responsive on a large log; oversized individual records are capped/lazy-loaded, not inlined.
criteria.verify: Load a 10,000-line run-log.jsonl fixture (with one oversized record). Assert bounded DOM node count (no full-file dump), interaction stays responsive, and the oversized record is behind an expand link. Maps U38/U39/B9.

criteria.statement: The skills-installed inventory shows, per skill, name + version + source/provenance + scope (user vs project) + enabled-vs-installed-vs-active state + component breakdown + permissions/trust — never a bare name-only list.
criteria.verify: Against an installed target's .claude/ payload (+ `claude plugin list`/`plugin details` schema), assert each skill card renders the required fields and the three distinct states (installed/enabled/active) and a version triad (installed vs latest). Maps U25/U26/B11.

criteria.statement: Each shipped UI slice passes VISION-VERIFY: re-captured screenshots judged by an independent verifier by Reading them against the frozen design direction + BV-list (the verifier names the image files it viewed; a BV violation fails).
criteria.verify: goal-verifier re-captures scripted screenshots of the slice and Reads them against docs/design/design-direction.md references + BV-list in the target; PASS requires the verdict to name the viewed image files and clear every BV item. Maps §7 gate / B12 (repo invariant: visual work verified by LOOKING).

criteria.statement: The dashboard is self-sufficient for the four mechanics: the operator never needs to run a terminal command to see skills / tokens (budget vs spend + per-iteration burn) / running goals / % — and the token meter is always-on and passive, not behind a command or tab.
criteria.verify: Walkthrough on a live/fixtured run: assert each of the four mechanics is visible without leaving the dashboard, and the token meter (cap vs cumulative + per-iteration attribution + at-current-rate forecast) is always-on. Maps S2/S3/S4/S5/U17/U18/U20/B10.

criteria.statement: FINAL ACCEPTANCE (live): a fresh operator, given only the running dashboard during a live >=2-goal run, can name the current loop stage + active goal, read % moving (incl. a drop on regression), read tokens vs budget + per-iteration burn, see installed skills, and notice within seconds a stall/flag/budget event.
criteria.verify: Live >=2-goal run on the target with `claude` on PATH; a fresh-eyes operator (or fresh-context judge over the recorded session) confirms all five reads from the dashboard ALONE; simultaneously C1-C13 hold. Human-legible demo gate (PRD §8).

banned_outcomes.statement: Stale/frozen data shown as live (no staleness indicator; a spinner that lies).
banned_outcomes.verify: Stop file updates; if the UI keeps presenting the frozen frame as live with no stale indicator -> FAIL (see C5).

banned_outcomes.statement: A torn/partial run-status.json rendered as 'no run', a crash, or a blank dashboard.
banned_outcomes.verify: Truncated-file fixture; any crash/blank/'no run' -> FAIL (see C2).

banned_outcomes.statement: The UI writes to or corrupts any CLI-owned file (run-status.json, run-log.jsonl, queue.json, STATE.md, .git, criteria.json). v1 is read-only; control-phase writes go only through sanctioned coordinated endpoints.
banned_outcomes.verify: Assert the UI process holds no write handle to CLI-owned files in v1; in the control phase, assert writes route through the coordinated endpoint + run-log audit, never direct file mutation.

banned_outcomes.statement: Server binds 0.0.0.0 / any non-loopback interface, or serves without Host-header validation.
banned_outcomes.verify: netstat/ss shows loopback-only; bad-Host request rejected (see C1).

banned_outcomes.statement: A secret in STATE.md/run-log re-displayed or exported without re-redaction.
banned_outcomes.verify: Injected-secret fixture appears in DOM/export -> FAIL (see C9).

banned_outcomes.statement: '% to goal' implies monotonic progress, uses fake-fill animation, shows 100% without a verifier-confirmed land-gate pass, or is derived from the agent's self-assessment.
banned_outcomes.verify: Regression fixture must drop the bar; 0/M must be an honest zero; 100% only with a land_gate 'land' event (see C4).

banned_outcomes.statement: Any run/goal/criterion state conveyed by color alone.
banned_outcomes.verify: DOM assertion: a status token with color as the only signifier -> FAIL (see C6).

banned_outcomes.statement: 'Visionary' delivered as ambient/decorative motion not mapped to a real state change, or motion that ignores prefers-reduced-motion.
banned_outcomes.verify: Audit each animation maps to a loop state change and honors reduced-motion (see C8); ambient/decorative motion -> FAIL.

banned_outcomes.statement: The run-log panel loads the whole file into the DOM (no virtualization) or a long run freezes the UI.
banned_outcomes.verify: 10k-line fixture; full-file DOM dump or frozen interaction -> FAIL (see C10).

banned_outcomes.statement: The operator must run a terminal command to see a mechanic the dashboard claims to surface, or the token meter is hidden behind a command/tab.
banned_outcomes.verify: Walkthrough: any of the four mechanics requiring the CLI, or a non-always-on token meter -> FAIL (see C13).

banned_outcomes.statement: Skills-installed reduced to a bare name-only list (no version/scope/enabled/permissions/active-state).
banned_outcomes.verify: Skill card missing the required fields -> FAIL (see C11).

banned_outcomes.statement: A UI slice verified by reading code/JSON only, without re-captured screenshots judged against the frozen design direction (vision-verify).
banned_outcomes.verify: A slice sign-off with no vision-verify verdict naming viewed images -> FAIL (see C12).

banned_outcomes.statement: A UI slice ships without a frozen /design-direction in the target first.
banned_outcomes.verify: Assert docs/design/design-direction.md + references + BV-list exist in the target before the slice's goal-opus run.

banned_outcomes.statement: The Default-FAIL gate presented as a correctness/security guarantee rather than a gameable anti-drift guardrail.
banned_outcomes.verify: Copy/legend audit: any UI text framing the gate as a security/correctness guarantee -> FAIL.
